overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a snowy mountain forest at night in a video game. Two riders on horseback pass by midway through the clip, and the journey continues toward a lone figure standing in the path ahead. The environment features dense snow-covered pine trees and distant mountain peaks under a dark blue night sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a snow-covered forest path at night, surrounded by snow-laden pine trees

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees heavily laden with snow on branches
narrow winding path covered in packed snow with visible footprints
distant mountain peak visible through the forest canopy, covered in snow
large rocks blanketed in snow lining the side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a dense snowy forest at night. Snow-covered pine trees line both sides of a narrow trail, with a distant snow-capped mountain visible through gaps in the canopy. The environment is quiet and empty, with only the sound of footsteps in the snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest trail with horse riders

events.description: two riders on horseback appear in the distance ahead on the trail
riders pass by on the right side and continue ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the trail as two horseback riders approach and pass by

notable_agents.action: two riders on horseback approaching along the snowy path at a faster pace

segments.scene_description: As the walk continues, two riders on horseback appear in the distance and approach rapidly. They pass by on the right side of the trail, their horses kicking up snow, before riding ahead into the forest. The camera maintains a steady walking pace throughout the encounter.

events.description: a lone figure becomes visible standing motionless in the path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the curving trail through deeper forest, approaching a lone figure standing ahead in the path

notable_agents.action: lone figure standing motionless in the middle of the snowy path ahead, facing the camera

segments.scene_description: After the riders pass, the journey continues through denser forest where the trail curves gently to the right. The tree canopy becomes thicker, blocking more of the sky. Toward the end of the segment, a lone figure becomes visible standing in the path ahead, creating a focal point as the camera approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a silent, snowy forest at night that transitions from an empty wilderness to a mysterious encounter. It begins by walking along a narrow trail lined with snow-covered pine trees, with distant snow-capped mountains peering through gaps in the dark canopy. As the walk continues, the solitude is briefly interrupted by two riders on horseback who approach rapidly and pass on the right, kicking up snow before disappearing further into the woods. The scene then shifts into a denser section of the forest where the trail curves gently and the thickening canopy obscures the night sky. Finally, the path opens up to reveal a lone figure standing motionless ahead, serving as the focal point as the camera draws closer.
